title: Pomkots World (Lost Cities add-on)
description:
Generates a sci-fi flavored, post-apocalyptic world.
This is an add-on for Lost Cities.
body:
# What's This?

This is an add-on for Lost Cities that generates a sci-fi flavored, post-apocalyptic world!

This is one of the elements to support the Survival Mode integration of [Pomkots Mechs](https://modrinth.com/mod/pomkots-mechs), a high-speed custom mech mod

# Demo Movie

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/m9ViPblu3qs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Please Read (Important!)

* This is currently in super alpha. Expect rapid updates and changes.
* Be sure to use it in a new world with a fresh configuration.
* Does NOT include enemy mech spawns, custom recipes, or quests yet — those will come later as part of a separate modpack.
* Many structures are still pretty empty inside (especially interiors).

# Need Your Help!

* I plan to keep adding a ton of ruined structures in future updates!
* If you're interested in helping build or submitting your own ruins, I'd love to collaborate!
* Please feel free to DM me on X (Twitter)!

# Ruined Cities Added

* Heavily decayed urban cities
* Abandoned industrial factory zones
* Derelict port areas
* Ruined mega-solar facilities
* Military base ruins

# Scattered Ruins Added

* Abandoned gas stations
* Collapsed farming plants
* Ruined garages
* Process factory ruins
* Lighthouse ruins
* Observation towers

...and more!

# How to Use (and Recommended Settings)

## Preparation

* Place Lost Cities and this mod in your modpack's mods folder.
* Launch Minecraft.

## Creating a New World

1. Start by creating a new world.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39e068d8215bc0aefc716a8f96d3e8aeaf8cd240.png)

2. Set the World Type to Large Biomes (recommended).
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebebab1bb8c3a851ecba874e5a9b7f6d0caa365d.png)

3. Go to the More tab and click the Cities button.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df085a9501adbcb43d6c6567563ed12b32cce04f.png)

4. Click the Profile button several times until you select rarecities.
(You can use other profiles too, but this one is recommended!)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/969952c87eae70d30f0c5c515cbc5d60b69ea89d.png)

5. Click the Customize button once. Then, click the setting that says standard several times until you see pomkotsmechs:pomkotsworld.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9ccc88ecc9ed0149eb670bfb0ccc9f1e7eea93b.png)

6. Set the Radius to 300.
(Recommended: sets the max radius of a city to 300 blocks.)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0609d6e6ddd7a4747e9ae4359638f636fd732d8.png)

7. Click the Cities button.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/603901a025408513f6e8e92131fac9af1b089bcb.png)

8. Adjust the building generation settings to your liking.
(Check the Lost Cities documentation for more detail!)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/951322bc5010227c658a2a88e1aa18680ec6e2ae.png)

Reference Links

Lost Cities official usage：https://www.mcjty.eu/docs/mods/lost-cities/

# Acknowledgment

Huge, ultra-super thanks to McJty for creating the amazing mod Lost Cities!
It’s a mod full of infinite possibilities and incredible potential.
Wishing continued success and prosperity of Lost Cities!

# Contributor

Pine-san(@Pining_Pine on X): Thanks for providing Aircraft and Warship!
